title: Bioinformatics (with thesis) Master's Program Mission and Vision
content:
Bioinformatics (with thesis) Master's Program Mission and Vision

Mission

The aim of the master's program with bioinformatics thesis is to train competent individuals who are trained in bioinformatics, which our country and the world need, and who can do research and development, and to contribute to national and international research and development activities in bioinformatics.

Vision

Üsküdar University aims to be an important research and development center in our country with its bioinformatics master's program with thesis.
